label: Precept comp (unwilling to do)
description: Makes a pawn unwilling to perform a specific action based on a history event.

description.label: Description
description.description: Description shown in the ideology editor.

eventDef.label: Event def
eventDef.description: The history event that the pawn is unwilling to perform.

nullifyingTraits.label: Nullifying traits
nullifyingTraits.description: Traits that override the unwillingness for this pawn.

nullifyingHediffs.label: Nullifying hediffs
nullifyingHediffs.description: Hediffs that override the unwillingness for this pawn.
